title: The Quiet One
writer: James Agee, Janice Loeb, Sidney Meyers
actors: Gary Merrill, Donald Thompson, Clarence Cooper
plot: A documentary account of the rehabilitation at the Wiltwyck School of an emotionally disturbed Black boy who is unwanted, misunderstood, and inwardly tortured.
awards: Nominated for 2 Oscars. 2 wins & 3 nominations total
